acceptance_criteria.text: news_generate is a real Operator paid-compute workflow from web chat and Inbox/API.
proof: Added web chat routing and POST /api/operator/news/generate.

acceptance_criteria.text: Workflow performs preflight, reserve, generate, usernews save, and charge only after success.
Failure and empty generation release the reservation without ledger charge.

proof: Result contract sets external_writes_performed=false and manual_publication_only=true.

acceptance_criteria.text: Web UI can trigger and copy the saved news draft.
proof: OperatorPage.tsx supports news_draft/news_text and Inbox button for news_generate.

acceptance_criteria.text: Docs and proof evidence describe the new boundary.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_news_generation.py tests/test_operator_review_reply_bulk.py tests/test_operator_manual_review.py tests/test_operator_inbox.py tests/test_operator_paid_preflight.py tests/test_operator_credit_reservation.py tests/test_operator_paid_actions.py tests/test_operator_paid_executor.py tests/test_operator_map_refresh.py tests/test_operator_audit.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py tests/test_telegram_response_router.py
known_gaps: Telegram parity, social post generation, services optimization, Apify actual-cost settlement, and fresh-review refresh remain later sprints.
